name: SolarWindow Technologies, Inc.
business: SolarWindow Technologies, Inc. develops proprietary transparent electricity-generating coatings (LiquidElectricity Coatings) that can be applied to rigid glass, flexible glass, and plastic surfaces to generate electricity from natural and artificial light. The company is pre-revenue and has no commercial products.
sellsTo: architectural flat glass and fabricated glass products

exposures.sentence: Our LiquidElectricity Coatings generate electricity by harvesting light energy from natural sun, artificial light, and low, shaded, or reflected light conditions.

LiquidElectricity applied with this methodology could benefit the agriculture market through utilizing crop shelter structures which offer protection in adverse climate conditions by generating electricity on greenhouse windows and canopies while simultaneously optimizing light transmission for maximum crop yield.

Our electricity-generating products present applications in various industries, including automotive, light and commercial trucks, recreational vehicles, marine, aerospace and defense, agrivoltaics, and others.
We believe that the rising demand for electric propulsion and autonomous piloting in these segments presents a timely opportunity for our electricity-generating technologies.

catalysts.event: CRADA performance period extension end date
catalysts.sentence: Over the course of our collaborative research and development efforts under the NREL CRADA, both parties have agreed to modifications to extend the period of performance. The current modification extends the period of performance to December 31, 2028.
